allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$result = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName aws-1-us-east-1.pooler.supabase.com -Port 443 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue
\\$result | Select-Object TcpTestSucceeded, PingSucceeded
" 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({ path: '.env.local' }\); const url = process.env.SUPABASE_URL; console.log\('SUPABASE_URL defined:', !!url\); if \(url\) { try { new URL\(url\); console.log\('URL valid:', url.startsWith\('http'\) ? 'yes \(starts with http\)' : 'suspicious'\); } catch { console.log\('URL INVALID'\); } }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('.env.local', 'utf8'\); const match = content.match\(/^SUPABASE_URL=\(.*\)$/m\); if \(match\) { const url = match[1].trim\(\); try { const u = new URL\(url\); console.log\('Protocol:', u.protocol\); console.log\('Host ends with supabase.co:', u.hostname.endsWith\('supabase.co'\)\); } catch { console.log\('INVALID URL'\); } } else { console.log\('NOT FOUND'\); }")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('@supabase/supabase-js:', pkg.dependencies['@supabase/supabase-js']\); console.log\('Node version:', process.version\);")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('postgres:', pkg.dependencies['postgres']\); console.log\('pg:', pkg.dependencies['pg']\);")

Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content 'app/ui/dashboard/create-project-form.tsx' -Raw\) -replace [regex]::Escape\(\\" {/\\* Computed total \\*/}`r`n
`r`n Estimated Total`r`n 0 ? 'var\(--text-primary\)' : 'var\(--text-muted\)' }}>`r`n {total > 0 ? total.toLocaleString\('fr-CA', { maximumFractionDigits: 2 }\) + ' \\$' : '—'}`r`n `r`n
\\"\) | Select-String 'Estimated Total' -Context 3")

PowerShell($auth = Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\xdg.data\\com.vercel.cli\\auth.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $auth.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $headers -Uri "https://api.vercel.com/v9/projects/prj_CohQJeUVDYwQyykVzBZqHAjAlAI2/env?teamId=team_RdHE2dBbrGdv4Ygl3lCYKtYW&decrypt=false"; $r.envs | Where-Object { $_.target -contains 'production' } | Select-Object key, type, updatedAt | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($auth = Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\xdg.data\\com.vercel.cli\\auth.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($auth.token\)" }; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $headers -Uri "https://api.vercel.com/v9/projects/prj_CohQJeUVDYwQyykVzBZqHAjAlAI2/env?teamId=team_RdHE2dBbrGdv4Ygl3lCYKtYW&decrypt=true"; $r.envs | Where-Object { $_.target -contains 'production' } | ForEach-Object { $v = $_.value; $len = if \($null -eq $v\) { 0 } else { $v.Length }; $hasNewline = if \($v -match "`r|`n"\) { 'YES' } else { 'no' }; [PSCustomObject]@{ key = $_.key; len = $len; newline = $hasNewline; preview = if \($len -gt 0\) { $v.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(12, $len\)\) } else { '\(EMPTY\)' } } } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($auth = Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\xdg.data\\com.vercel.cli\\auth.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($auth.token\)" }; $d = Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $headers -Uri "https://api.vercel.com/v6/deployments?projectId=prj_CohQJeUVDYwQyykVzBZqHAjAlAI2&teamId=team_RdHE2dBbrGdv4Ygl3lCYKtYW&target=production&limit=5"; $d.deployments | Select-Object uid, state, @{n='created';e={[DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeMilliseconds\($_.created\).ToString\('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'\)}}, url | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($s = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; $csrf = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://nextjs-theta-blush-63.vercel.app/api/auth/csrf" -WebSession $s\).csrfToken; $body = @{ csrfToken = $csrf; email = 'test@example.com'; password = 'wrongpass123' }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://nextjs-theta-blush-63.vercel.app/api/auth/callback/credentials" -Method POST -Body $body -WebSession $s -MaximumRedirection 0 -UseBasicParsing } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; "STATUS: $\($resp.StatusCode.value__\)"; "LOCATION: $\($resp.Headers['Location']\)" })

PowerShell($csrfJson = curl.exe -s -c cookies.txt "https://nextjs-theta-blush-63.vercel.app/api/auth/csrf" | ConvertFrom-Json; $csrf = $csrfJson.csrfToken; curl.exe -s -o NUL -b cookies.txt -D - -X POST "https://nextjs-theta-blush-63.vercel.app/api/auth/callback/credentials" --data-urlencode "csrfToken=$csrf" --data-urlencode "email=test@example.com" --data-urlencode "password=wrongpass123" | Select-String -Pattern '^\(HTTP|location\)')

PowerShell($auth = Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\xdg.data\\com.vercel.cli\\auth.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; curl.exe -s -N -H "Authorization: Bearer $\($auth.token\)" "https://api.vercel.com/v1/projects/prj_CohQJeUVDYwQyykVzBZqHAjAlAI2/deployments/dpl_HPBRKxNy3q7UtP7eSAmF5EbZQXdU/runtime-logs?teamId=team_RdHE2dBbrGdv4Ygl3lCYKtYW&format=json" --max-time 90 > runtime-logs.ndjson 2>&1; "captured $\(\(Get-Item runtime-logs.ndjson -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Length\) bytes")

PowerShell("--- /api/auth/session with garbage cookie ---"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "status=%{http_code}`n" -H "Cookie: __Secure-authjs.session-token=eyJhbGciOiJkaXIiLCJlbmMiOiJBMjU2R0NNIn0..garbage.garbage" "https://nextjs-theta-blush-63.vercel.app/api/auth/session"; "--- /dashboard with garbage cookie ---"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "status=%{http_code} redirect=%{redirect_url}`n" -H "Cookie: __Secure-authjs.session-token=eyJhbGciOiJkaXIiLCJlbmMiOiJBMjU2R0NNIn0..garbage.garbage" "https://nextjs-theta-blush-63.vercel.app/dashboard"; "--- GET /login ---"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "status=%{http_code}`n" "https://nextjs-theta-blush-63.vercel.app/login"; "--- /api/auth/error page ---"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "status=%{http_code}`n" "https://nextjs-theta-blush-63.vercel.app/api/auth/error?error=Configuration")

PowerShell(Select-String -Path .env.local -Pattern '^\(SUPABASE_URL|SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY|AUTH_SECRET\)' | ForEach-Object { $k,$v = $_.Line -split '=',2; "$k len=$\($v.Trim\(\).Length\)" }; "--- prod pull ---"; Select-String -Path .vercel\\.env.production.local -Pattern '^\(SUPABASE_URL|AUTH_SECRET\)' | ForEach-Object { $k,$v = $_.Line -split '=',2; "$k len=$\($v.Trim\(\).Length\)" })

PowerShell($auth = Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\xdg.data\\com.vercel.cli\\auth.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; curl.exe -s -N -H "Authorization: Bearer $\($auth.token\)" "https://api.vercel.com/v1/projects/prj_CohQJeUVDYwQyykVzBZqHAjAlAI2/deployments/dpl_HPBRKxNy3q7UtP7eSAmF5EbZQXdU/runtime-logs?teamId=team_RdHE2dBbrGdv4Ygl3lCYKtYW&format=json" --max-time 60 > runtime-logs.ndjson 2>$null; "done")

PowerShell($csrfJson = curl.exe -s -c cookies.txt "https://nextjs-theta-blush-63.vercel.app/api/auth/csrf" | ConvertFrom-Json; $csrf = $csrfJson.csrfToken; curl.exe -s -o NUL -b cookies.txt -c cookies.txt -D - -X POST "https://nextjs-theta-blush-63.vercel.app/api/auth/callback/credentials" --data-urlencode "csrfToken=$csrf" --data-urlencode "email=claude-login-test@example.com" --data-urlencode "password=ClaudeTest123!" | Select-String -Pattern '^\(HTTP|location|set-cookie\)' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(120, $_.Line.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -o dashboard.html -b cookies.txt -L -w "final_status=%{http_code} final_url=%{url_effective}`n" "https://nextjs-theta-blush-63.vercel.app/dashboard"; Select-String -Path dashboard.html -Pattern 'Server error|problem with the server|Application error' | Select-Object -First 3; "size=$\(\(Get-Item dashboard.html\).Length\)")

PowerShell($auth = Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\xdg.data\\com.vercel.cli\\auth.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($auth.token\)" }; "=== project domains ==="; $doms = Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $headers -Uri "https://api.vercel.com/v9/projects/prj_CohQJeUVDYwQyykVzBZqHAjAlAI2/domains?teamId=team_RdHE2dBbrGdv4Ygl3lCYKtYW"; $doms.domains | Select-Object name, verified | Format-Table -AutoSize; "=== latest prod aliases ==="; $d = Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $headers -Uri "https://api.vercel.com/v13/deployments/dpl_HPBRKxNy3q7UtP7eSAmF5EbZQXdU?teamId=team_RdHE2dBbrGdv4Ygl3lCYKtYW"; $d.alias -join "`n")

PowerShell(Get-Content runtime-logs.ndjson | Select-Object -Skip 3; "--- prod vs local SUPABASE_URL match ---"; $local = \(Select-String -Path .env.local -Pattern '^SUPABASE_URL=\(.+\)$'\).Matches.Groups[1].Value.Trim\(\).Trim\('"'\); $prod = \(Select-String -Path .vercel\\.env.production.local -Pattern '^SUPABASE_URL=\(.+\)$'\).Matches.Groups[1].Value.Trim\(\).Trim\('"'\); if \($local -eq $prod\) { "SAME database" } else { "DIFFERENT: local=$local prod=$prod" })

PowerShell($auth = Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\xdg.data\\com.vercel.cli\\auth.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; curl.exe -s -N -H "Authorization: Bearer $\($auth.token\)" "https://api.vercel.com/v1/projects/prj_CohQJeUVDYwQyykVzBZqHAjAlAI2/deployments/dpl_HPBRKxNy3q7UtP7eSAmF5EbZQXdU/runtime-logs?teamId=team_RdHE2dBbrGdv4Ygl3lCYKtYW&format=json" --max-time 300 > runtime-logs-live.ndjson 2>$null; "stream ended, $\(\(Get-Item runtime-logs-live.ndjson -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Length\) bytes")

PowerShell($D = "https://nextjs-victordumas01-2905s-projects.vercel.app"; "--- csrf ---"; curl.exe -s -o csrf.json -w "status=%{http_code}`n" -c cookies2.txt "$D/api/auth/csrf"; Get-Content csrf.json -TotalCount 1; $csrf = \(Get-Content csrf.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).csrfToken; "--- login POST ---"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -b cookies2.txt -c cookies2.txt -D - -X POST "$D/api/auth/callback/credentials" --data-urlencode "csrfToken=$csrf" --data-urlencode "email=claude-login-test@example.com" --data-urlencode "password=ClaudeTest123!" | Select-String -Pattern '^\(HTTP|location|set-cookie\)' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(140, $_.Line.Length\)\) })

PowerShell($f = Get-Item runtime-logs-live.ndjson -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($f\) { "size=$\($f.Length\)" }; Get-Content runtime-logs-live.ndjson | ForEach-Object { $j = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; "$\([DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeMilliseconds\($j.timestampInMs\).ToString\('HH:mm:ss'\)\) [$\($j.level\)] $\($j.requestMethod\) $\($j.requestPath\) dom=$\($j.domain\)`n   $\($j.message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(400, $j.message.Length\)\)\)" })

PowerShell($D = "https://nextjs-victordumas01-2905s-projects.vercel.app"; curl.exe -s "$D/login" -o login.html; $m = Select-String -Path login.html -Pattern '\\$ACTION_ID_\([a-f0-9]{40,}\)' -AllMatches; if \($m\) { $m.Matches | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value } | Select-Object -Unique } else { "no ACTION_ID found in HTML, searching js refs"; \(Select-String -Path login.html -Pattern '\([a-f0-9]{40,}\)' -AllMatches\).Matches | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value } | Select-Object -Unique -First 10 })

PowerShell($D = "https://nextjs-victordumas01-2905s-projects.vercel.app"; $csrfJson = curl.exe -s -c cookies3.txt "$D/api/auth/csrf" | ConvertFrom-Json; $csrf = $csrfJson.csrfToken; curl.exe -s -o NUL -b cookies3.txt -H "Cookie: __Secure-authjs.callback-url=$D%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Fcallback%2Fcredentials" -D - -X POST "$D/api/auth/callback/credentials" --data-urlencode "csrfToken=$csrf" --data-urlencode "email=claude-login-test@example.com" --data-urlencode "password=ClaudeTest123!" | Select-String -Pattern '^\(HTTP|location\)')
